data.title: 国际服主线Vol.3 第一章后篇更新
data.summary: [Update Preview] Sensei, Main Story Vol. 3 Eden Treaty Ep.1 'Make-Up Work Club, Here We Go!' second
data.body:
[Update Preview]

Sensei, Main Story Vol. 3 Eden Treaty Ep.1 'Make-Up Work Club, Here We Go!' second half is scheduled for 4/5 (Tue)!
The boot camp begins... Will the Make-Up Work Club students be able to avoid failing?

#BlueArchive
